_comment: Packagist malicious-package SCA fixture. Verified present in cas_malicious_packages Firestore (MAL-2026-3637). Package intercom-php version 5.0.2. The packages-api /query endpoint returns isMalicious:true for this exact name+version. The 'intercom-php' require below is the malicious one; 'monolog/monolog' is a benign control that should NOT be flagged.
name: example/malicious-package-fixture
description: SCA fixture containing a known-malicious Packagist package
